generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While we debate strategic autonomy, our allies are quietly shifting defense burdens onto us. A recent report shows that just 3 key partners have cut their defense budgets by 15% this year alone. Meanwhile, our preparedness programs face funding cuts. It's time to demand accountability - our security shouldn't be a gamble. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
